hypothesis: Evidence-aligned medication-temporality post classification (H1) improves medication_temporality precision on the full fixed validation split (40 records) after cap-25 gate clearance (+14.5pp precision, F1 stable on cap-25).
metric_caveats: Full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records) for exect_s4_temporality_deterministic_v1; not published Table 1 reproduction.
Only medication_temporality recovery uses exect.medication_temporality.post_classifier.v1; other families unchanged.
Medication_temporality precision is the primary decision metric; recall and pooled micro are diagnostic.
Cap-25 anchor: H1 61.3% MT precision (+14.5pp vs L1 46.8%; F1 -0.4pp) at runs/exect_s4_temporality_h1_post_classifier_cap25_gpt4_1_mini_20260520T203803Z.
Non-ASM temporality predictions are dropped post-hoc to target precision collapse from over-extraction.
